title: Bauru, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bauru, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bauru is a city in SP with a population of 381,706. A major railway and university city in central São Paulo, known for its namesake sandwich, the Bauru, and the Marechal Rondon highway hub.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
